title: pisum quadratum
intro: Pisum quadratum, commonly known as Garden Pea, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the Pisum genus. It is valued for its edible seeds, which are rich in nutrients and offer numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. The therapeutic actions of Pisum quadratum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antidiabetic properties, which make it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Pisum quadratum include proteins, fiber, vitamins, minerals, and polyphenolic compounds, such as phenolic acids and flavonoids, which contribute to its health-promoting effects.
